extracted.ability: Pollinated — applies Pollinated mutation (3×) to a random crop every ~25 min during Bizzy Bee event.

name: Chocolate Bunny
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Golden Egg (Easter Event 2026) — 55% drop rate. Golden Egg costs 25,000 Choc Coins base (price doubles each purchase, resets every 12h).

extracted.ability: Choc Chomper — occasionally eats a Carrot plant with Choc mutation and spreads Choc to 2 random other fruits. Ignores favorited fruit.

name: Easter Egg Chick
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official

extracted.ability: Easter Eggcelerator — reduces hatch time on a random un-hatched egg. Bonus scales with each additional Easter Egg Chick in garden (stacking confirmed). Suspected 2× hatch speed cap.

name: Marshmallow Lamb
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Golden Egg (Easter Event 2026) — 9% drop rate. Note: previously reported as 1% — 9% is the confirmed rate per Fandom Wiki and Sportskeeda. Easter Bunny is the 1% pet.

extracted.ability: The Smore You Know — grants another pet either XP or advances its cooldown; the Marshmallow Lamb then receives whichever bonus was NOT given. Also has a chance to apply Plasma (5×) mutation after crop collection.

name: Easter Bunny
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Golden Egg (Easter Event 2026) — 1% drop rate (some sources cite 0.5%). Rarest Golden Egg pet.

extracted.ability: Egg Hunt — hides an Easter Egg reward at regular intervals (every 23:45 min at Age 1). Finding it grants 10,000 XP to pets, age-up effects, Choc Coins, and other bonuses. With full cooldown-reduction pet loadout, egg spawn rate can reach ~40 seconds. Mimics do NOT work with this ability.

name: Gummy Bear
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Easter Shop (Easter Event 2026) — 7,500 Choc Coins or 479 Robux. Multiple color variants: Red, Blue, Yellow, Green.

extracted.ability: Gummy Express — randomly applies Gummy mutation to crops in range. Single passive — no secondary ability.

name: Hootsie Roll
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Easter Shop (Easter Event 2026) — 8,000 Choc Coins or 559 Robux. Three-colored owl based on Tootsie Roll candy.

extracted.ability: Hootsie Experience — grants bonus XP/s to all Easter-type pets in garden. Hootsie Effect — grants bonus XP/s to ALL pets in garden. Both are passive — no activation required.

name: Firemite
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Season 4 Pass — Level 2 reward. Giant Firemite from Premium pass.

extracted.ability: Light Up — ignites a random pet, advancing its cooldown. Extra cooldown advance per additional Firemite in garden (stacks).

name: Hazehound
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Season 4 Pass — Level 40 reward. Rainbow Hazehound from Premium pass.

extracted.ability: Hound of Ash — applies Ash mutation to a random fruit (cycle: 13:15 standard / 9:56 Rainbow). Hound of Haze — applies Haze mutation to a random fruit (cycle: 16:34 standard / 13:15 Rainbow). Single-fruit targeting only. Both are CRITICAL inputs for the Smoldering composite mutation pipeline.

name: Rainbow Cerberus
sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
obtainMethod: Season 4 Pass — Level 47 reward (Premium pass). Standard Cerberus at Level 47 free tier; Rainbow Cerberus from Premium.

extracted.ability: Trial by Fire — every 36:26 (standard) / 29:46 (Rainbow): devours a crop with ALL FOUR of Ash + Haze + Burnt + Flaming mutations simultaneously, then applies Smoldering mutation to a different crop in the garden. 3.35% (standard) / 4.35% (Rainbow) chance per activation to level up a random garden pet. Flame Deity (passive) — when a Smoldering-mutated crop is sold: 6.12% (standard) / 8.12% (Rainbow) chance a random mutation from that crop spreads to another garden fruit.

sourceNote: Extracted from visible GAGData pet values page; verify before marking official
